title: Melted Filipino Shrimp Fried Rice
description: Salty, cheese-pulled fried rice with shrimp and dried shrimp paste, perfect for a post-workout boost.
instructions: Heat the lazy susan spinner and add vegetable oil until shimmering.
Add diced onion and minced garlic, sautéing until fragrant and translucent.
Stir in the dried shrimp goong haeng, cooking for 30 seconds to release its aroma.
Add the shrimp and cook until pink and opaque, about 3 minutes.
Pour in the jasmine rice, breaking up clumps and mixing thoroughly with the shrimp mixture.
Season with soy sauce, black pepper, and fish sauce, stirring to combine evenly.
Lower the heat and sprinkle the shredded mozzarella over the rice, covering the pan.
Cover and allow the cheese to melt, stirring gently every 2 minutes until fully melted and creamy.
Fold in fresh cilantro, give a final stir, and serve hot straight from the spinner.
